top_signals.title: Frustrating Israel, fiber-optic killer drone technology has arrived in southern Lebanon
top_signals.summary: Analysts believe that any military engaged in conflict will, in one form or another, encounter technologies first seen in Ukraine.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Qualcomm inks deal for AI startup Modular to bolster software stack, data center build-out
top_signals.summary: Qualcomm is looking to expand its position in the data center market as AI demand skyrockets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s Retreating Retail Army Exposes Fresh Fragility
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin spent years trying to shed its reputation as a playground for speculative retail traders. Its latest selloff is exposing the tradeoff: Wall Street brought scale and legitimacy, but the retail buyers who once helped absorb sharp declines have largely vanished.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. crude oil dips below $70 as tankers transit Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Running on empty: Climate risks and the fragility of global energy and food supply chains − speech by Swati Dhingra
top_signals.summary: Given at the World Resources Institute, London
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump scraps planned signing of US housing affordability bill
top_signals.summary: Bipartisan legislation is designed to boost supply and curb institutional investors’ role in property market

top_signals.title: Mamdani-backed candidates sweep New York primaries
top_signals.summary: Democrat voters shift allegiance to new generation of leftwing politicians

top_signals.title: JIP takes sharper nuclear stance than LDP in security proposals
top_signals.summary: The junior coalition partner in the ruling bloc is pushing for a "realistic review" of allowing nukes into the country, while the LDP is looking to bolster extended deterrence.
